title: Total Factor Productivity of the Food Chain
body: " The Total Factor Productivity web pages have undergone a review and redesign in order to improve the user experience. With effect from June 2025, food and drink industry total factor productivity publications will be published here in a topic specific collection page enabling users to find content more quickly and more easily. The previous collection page can be found at:  Food chain analysis collection: attitudes and behaviour around sustainable food purchasing, estimating food and drink elasticities, links between food and drink waste and purchases.   This series examines the total factor productivity of the United Kingdom food chain. This is examined within the four main food industry sectors and compared to the wider economy. "
